basic_details.job_title: Assam Rifles Public School Principal Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Assam Rifles Public School has released the official Principal Recruitment 2026 notification. The recruitment drive is being conducted to fill the post of Principal on a full-time basis. Candidates possessing a Master's Degree with a minimum of 50% marks, B.Ed, CTET qualification, adequate computer knowledge, and 5 to 8 years of teaching and administrative experience can apply through the offline mode on or before 13 June 2026. The official notification and application details are available below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree (minimum 50% marks), B.Ed and CTET Qualified, with adequate computer knowledge. Minimum 5 to 8 years of teaching and administrative experience.
qualification.details: Master's Degree (minimum 50% marks) B.Ed CTET Qualified Adequate computer knowledge Minimum 05 (Five) to 8 (Eight) years of teaching and administrative experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Assam Rifles Public School Principal Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.assamrifles.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 13-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Principal post at Assam Rifles Public School?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Principal post is 13th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the Principal position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree with a minimum of 50% marks, a B.Ed degree, and be CTET qualified. Adequate computer knowledge is also a requirement.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any experience required for the Principal post?
faq.answer: Yes, a minimum of 5 to 8 years of teaching and administrative experience is mandatory for the Principal position.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Principal recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it with the required details, attach necessary documents, and submit it to the specified address.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the available information, there is no application fee mentioned for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. Where is Assam Rifles Public School located?
faq.answer: Assam Rifles Public School is located in Shillong, Meghalaya, with the pincode 793010.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Principal post?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for the Principal position?
faq.answer: The notification mentions a "Good Pay Scale" for the Principal post, but specific salary details are not provided in the summary.

faq.question: Q9. Is there an age limit for the Principal post?
faq.answer: The age limit details are not explicitly mentioned in the provided summary. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any age-related criteria.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: You need to submit your complete bio-data, a photograph, and supporting documents such as education certificates and experience certificates.
